title.en: From Data Classification to Masking and Encryption: Security Information Governance Practices for Internet Companies
title.zh: 从数据分级到脱敏加密：互联网企业安全信息治理实践

summary.en: A cross-jurisdictional analysis of security information classification, personal information protection, sensitive data controls, masking, de-identification, anonymization, encryption, key management, and lifecycle governance for internet companies.
summary.zh: 面向互联网企业，系统梳理跨法域安全信息分类、个人信息保护、敏感数据控制、脱敏、去标识化、匿名化、加密、密钥管理与全生命周期治理。

readingDirection.en: Read this when building enterprise data classification, masking, encryption, key management, data export, logging, and lifecycle governance controls.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在建设企业级数据分类分级、脱敏、加密、密钥管理、数据导出、日志治理和生命周期控制时阅读。
